About: It is about seven people shot and killed during a robbery at the Lin Yue restaurant in Sittensen, Lower Saxony, Germany.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with a robbery.
CausedBy: It is caused by a robbery.
HasA: It has a two-year-old girl left alive.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by sensationalist reporting.
HeldIn: It was held in the Lin Yue restaurant.
HeldOn: It was held on the night of 4–5 February 2007.
IsA: It is one of the worst mass murders in post-war German history.
KnownAs: It is known as the "seven-fold murders of Sittensen".
It is known as the "Sittensen massacre".
KnownFor: It is known for the shooting and killing of seven people during a robbery.
LocatedIn: It is located in Sittensen, Lower Saxony, Germany.
OccurredAt: It occurred at the Lin Yue restaurant.
OccurredIn: It occurred in Sittensen, Lower Saxony, Germany.
OccurredOn: It occurred on the night of 4–5 February 2007.
PartOf: It is part of post-war German history.
PerformedBy: It was performed by five Vietnamese immigrants.

HasFeatureOf: それはセンセーショナルな報道によって特徴づけられます。
HeldIn: それはリン・ユエ・レストランで開催されました。
HeldOn: それは2007年2月4日から5日の夜に開催されました。
IsA: それは戦後ドイツ史上最悪の大量殺人事件の一つです。
KnownAs: それは「ジッテンゼンの七重殺人」として知られています。
それは「ジッテンゼン虐殺」として知られています。
KnownFor: それは強盗中に7人が射殺されたことで知られています。
